prompt: Generate the phrase 'Burn Bright' using vertical brush-style script like the second image, arranged inside a flame shape like the first.
prompt_refined: Generate an image of the phrase 'Burn Bright'. The text should be presented in a white, vertical, brush-style script, closely mimicking the calligraphic style and orientation of the text in image 2. This 'Burn Bright' text should be centrally arranged within a vibrant orange-red flame shape, similar in form and texture to the flame depicted in image 1. Ensure the flame includes a matchstick base, also inspired by image 1. The overall composition should feature this graphic element prominently against a dark background, evoking the aesthetic of image 1.
